entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop being bred for salinity tolerance

entities.name: SALINITY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand high salt concentrations

entities.name: SALINITY STRESS
entities.description: The environmental stress caused by high soil salinity

entities.name: GERMINATION/SEEDLING TOLERANCE
entities.description: Salinity tolerance during the germination and seedling emergence stages

entities.name: ADULT-PLANT TOLERANCE
entities.description: Salinity tolerance during the later stages of plant growth

entities.name: WHOLE-CROP TOLERANCE
entities.description: The overall tolerance of the crop to salinity across all growth stages

entities.name: SCREENING METHODS
entities.description: Techniques used to identify plants with salinity tolerance

entities.name: SELECTION CRITERIA
entities.description: Standards used to choose plants for breeding based on salinity tolerance

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL TOOLS
entities.description: Traditional breeding and screening tools used for genetic improvement

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup of a crop for specific traits

entities.name: INHERITANCE
entities.description: The process by which genetic traits are passed from parents to offspring
